title: 4Pcs Beach Bathroom Wall Decor, Blue Wooden Surfboard Coastal Hanging Plaques Inspirational Quote Signs Ornaments for Bedroom Living Room 11.4x3.9 in
features: Vibrant Beach Wall Art: Transform any space with this exquisite set of 4 premium wooden hanging signs, each measuring 29x10cm/11.4x3.9 inches. Each piece features coordinating but non-repeating designs - you'll receive the hanging wall decor with surfboard shaped， wood textured and "life is better at the beach" printed, creating visual interest when displayed together. Perfect for creating a gallery wall above a sofa or bed or being nice decorations for your bathroom, bedroom, kitchen etc. These signs arrive ready to hang with pre-strung premium ropes, securely fastened with nails drilled into reinforced backing points.

Premium Quality Construction: Unlike flimsy cardboard or plastic signs, our plaques are crafted from 5mm thick solid wood with finely polished without burs for safety and a comfy feel. High-quality material is selected to create these lightweight yet durable plaques that feel substantial in hand. The vibrant colors are applied using advanced UV printing technology that resists fading. Each set includes four complementary but distinct designs that work harmoniously together - mix and match them vertically, horizontally, or in a creative cluster to tell your unique style story.

Thoughtful & Beautiful Design: These plaques are designed with full heart for the maximum decorative impact. Our design team created these signs to solve common decor dilemmas: bland walls that lack personality, awkward narrow spaces that need filling, or areas that crave a pop of color without overwhelming the room. The 29x10cm size is intentionally proportioned to fit perfectly between standard door frames, along staircases, or as part of a larger gallery wall arrangement. The typography is carefully sized while maintaining an elegant aesthetic up close. The color palette complements most home styles - from beach house to modern boho.

Effortless Installation & Flexible Display Options: We've eliminated the frustration of complicated mounting with our user-friendly design. Each plaque is strung together with string, which is nailed to the back of the sign with nails. The lightweight construction means no heavy-duty hardware is required - simple nails, strips, or decorative twine work perfectly. The smooth back sits flush against walls without wobbling, and the slim profile (under 1cm depth) won't interfere with opening doors or cabinets. For renters or those who change decor frequently, the signs leave no marks when removed properly.

Nice Gift Ready for Any Occasion:Our wooden wall hanging plaques are sure to make an unforgettable present for housewarmings, weddings, Mother's Day, Father's Day, birthday or Christmas. The sea themed design appeals to all ages and styles - teens love them for dorm rooms, adults display them in living room, bedroom, bathroom, and retirees enjoy them in craft rooms. You can also use multiple sets to decorate entire hallways or create themed displays.
description: Wooden Beach Hanging Signs - 4pcs 29x10cm Pre-Strung Wall Plaques with Colorful Printed Designs – Home & Office Decor Set - Elevate your spaces with this delicately crafted 4-piece wooden sign collection, designed for effortless decoration. Each 29x10cm plaque is made from high-quality wood, ensuring a smooth surface that highlights the vibrant, colorfast prints. The hanging plaques are designed with surfboard shape with wood texture and "Life is Better at thr Beach", curated to complement various aesthetics. Use Cases: - Create gallery walls by pairing photo frames or various designs of wooden signs - Retail displays for boutiques or coffee shops - Wedding aisle/backdrop decorations - Bathroom, bedroom, living room, beach house decor Size: 29x10cm/11.4x3.9 inch with 5mm thickness Package Includes: 4 x Printed wooden signs with pre-attached ropes (nailed at reinforced points), 1 x Airplane box. Please be reminded that due to lighting effects and monitor's brightness, the color tone of the photos and the actual item could be slightly different.
